To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create the         
necessary files and ensure they are correctly set up. Here is the initial       
implementation:                                                                 

 1 Create the minigit executable file:                                          
    • This will be a Ruby script with a shebang line and type signatures using  
      RBS.                                                                      
 2 Create the .rbs file for type signatures:                                    
    • This will define the types for the methods in the minigit script.         
 3 Ensure the script is executable:                                             
    • Set the appropriate permissions on the minigit file.                      

Let's start with the minigit script:                                            

minigit                                                                         

                                                                                
@@ -1 +1,6 @@                                                                   
 #!/usr/bin/env ruby                                                            
+                                                                               
+# minigit.rbs                                                                  
+require 'steep'                                                                
+                                                                               
+module Minigit                                                                 
+  class << self                                                                
+    extend T::Sig                                                              
+                                                                               
+    sig { params(args: T::Array[String]).void }                                
+    def main(args)                                                             
+      puts "Hello, #{args[0]}!"                                                
+    end                                                                        
+    end                                                                        
+  end                                                                          
+end                                                                            
+                                                                               
+Minigit.main(ARGV)                                                             
                                                                                

Next, let's create the .rbs file for type signatures:                           

minigit.rbs                                                                     

                                                                                
# minigit.rbs                                                                   
                                                                                
require 'steep'                                                                 
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
module Minigit                                                                  
                                                                                
  class << self                                                                 
                                                                                
    extend T::Sig                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    sig { params(args: T::Array[String]).void }                                 
                                                                                
    def main(args)                                                              
                                                                                
      puts "Hello, #{args[0]}!"                                                 
                                                                                
    end                                                                         
                                                                                
  end                                                                           
                                                                                
end                                                                             
                                                                                

Finally, ensure the minigit file is executable:

+chmod +x minigit

If all tests pass and type checking is successful, you should be good to go!
